task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Toyota Prius (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $28550.00 and wholesale is $22120.00. Product features: Hybrid hatchback with up to 57 mpg combined fuel efficiency. Reference: https://www.toyota.com/prius/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Toyota Prius. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Toyota Prius. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
